description: Fixed all 5 bugs in product create/update: 1) Edit success now redirects to product list using Get.until(), 2) Toast snackbar now properly displays for both create and edit (including error toast in edit catch block), 3) Added form validators for required fields (name, initial price, selling price, unit) and selling_price >= initial_price validation, 4) Added auto-generation of SKU and barcode based on category prefix + name prefix + padded ID, 5) Image upload now saves locally with compression (512px max width, JPEG quality 70) using image package and path_provider

name: Fix toast after create product navigation
